Q117b.full_text:
Ramesh pays income tax which is a - Direct tax

Direct tax
→ The type of tax levied by the government where the impact and incidence of tax lies on the same individual.
→ The burden of tax cannot be shifted from one individual to the other.
example - income tax, corporation tax

Indirect tax
→ The type of tax levied by the government on consumption of goods and services where the impact and incidence of tax lies on different individuals.
→ The burden of tax can be shifted from one individual to the other (seller → buyer)
example - Goods & services tax (GST).
Value added tax (VAT)
